query:
SELECT cp.id, cp.sellerId, s.name, cp.points, cp.salesCount, cp.competitionId,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = cp.sellerId AND competitionId = cp.competitionId AND status = 'approved') as realCompSales
FROM competition_participants cp 
JOIN sellers s ON s.id = cp.sellerId
ORDER BY cp.competitionId, cp.points DESC;
